# awattar/claude-code-best-practices. # 🧠 Claude Code Best Practices. This repo distills best practices, patterns, and examples for integrating Claude Code into your terminal-based coding environment. ## ✨ What is Claude Code? Claude Code is a command-line tool that gives you direct access to Claude’s reasoning and coding capabilities. It’s designed for agentic coding - where Claude autonomously explores, edits, and explains code across your project. Claude Code is optimized for agentic coding - AI that acts with autonomy and awareness:. This repository includes a collection of custom slash commands designed to streamline development workflows with Claude Code. Automatically generates comprehensive CLAUDE.md files for any project by analyzing project structure, technology stack, and development patterns. Provides comprehensive help documentation for all available custom commands, including usage examples and best practices. ## 📚 Claude Code Documentation. 💻 Best practices and examples for using Claude Code - Anthropic’s terminal-native AI - for writing, editing, and refactoring code with deep project awareness, prompt design, and safe automation.

title: 💻 10 Essential Claude Code Best Practices You Need to Know
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# 10 Essential Claude Code Best Practices You Need to Know. Recently, I came across a repository called “claude-code-best-practice” that shot to the top of GitHub Trending with over 20k stars. The author compiled 84 best practices for Claude Code, covering everything from prompting to CLAUDE.md configuration, skills management, and debugging strategies. As a long-time Claude Code user, I spent over two hours going through every single practice. Later, I learned from Boris Cherny (creator of Claude Code) that frontier LLMs can reliably follow about 150-200 instructions, and Claude Code’s system prompt already uses around 50. If Claude can infer it from reading the code, don’t put it in CLAUDE.md. Boris himself has mentioned this multiple times, and it should be common knowledge for Claude Code users by now. I used to dive straight into coding, which often resulted in Claude writing a bunch of code in the wrong direction, forcing me to start over.

title: 💻 Claude Code Security Best Practices - Backslash
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Security Best Practices. Claude Code is a popular agentic coding assistant designed by Anthropic to run in a developer’s terminal, offering deep codebase analysis, code generation, project planning, and automation through natural language prompts. ## **Why Claude Code Security Matters**. When AI becomes part of your coding environment, the IDE is no longer “just a text editor.” It’s an insider with:. * **The ability to run commands**. That’s not just convenience — it’s risk. A single poisoned prompt or misconfigured setting can turn Claude Code from your coding partner into a threat actor. This blog is your guide to staying safe: how to configure Claude Code, what traps to avoid, and how to combine internal and external defenses. Every time it runs a command or reads a file, it’s acting with your permissions. ## **The Heart of Security: `managed-settings.json`**. Like most AI coders, Claude Code has a variety of configuration settings for security. Claude Code’s security settings live here:.

All rights reserved.·Privacy·Terms. # Batch Documentation Operations. Manages batch operations on multiple documentation files using pattern matching and parallel execution. Acts as a high-level director for managing large sets of documentation. This skill efficiently handles batch operations like writing, validating, and auditing across numerous files identified by wildcard patterns. It orchestrates tasks by delegating to a single-document manager, executing them in parallel for speed while using file locking to prevent conflicts. Safety is paramount, with built-in previews and user confirmation for destructive actions, comprehensive progress reporting, and graceful handling of partial failures. ## Key Features. ## Use Cases. ### Install. title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing #Linux - Qiita
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing. Claude Code users often face the challenge of "wanting to execute multiple prompts sequentially" and "automating code generation with overnight batch processing." Many also need "project-specific prompt management" for their development workflows. This article provides a detailed explanation of the batch processing features added in Prompt Scheduler v1.0.2, along with real development scenarios. I want to clearly state that this is an independent personal development project with no connection whatsoever to Anthropic's Claude or Claude Code. Batch processing in Prompt Scheduler refers to **the functionality of pre-defining multiple prompts and automatically executing them in a specified order**. * Continuous prompt execution in active development projects. # Overnight batch (aggressive execution ignoring limits) \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --ignore-approaching-limit \ --hours # Phased execution during business hours \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --stop-at. * **Project management**: Parallel processing of multiple projects with `--prompt-file`. * **Limit processing**: Aggressive execution with `--ignore-approaching-limit`.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format text. claude -p "Process this large dataset" --output-format stream-json`. claude -p "Analyze this code" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format json | jq '.usage'`. session_id=$(claude -p "Start review" --output-format json \. claude -p "Continue the review" --resume "$session_id"`. claude -p "Review the code" \. - claude -p "Analyze maintainability issues" --output-format json. - claude -p "Check for performance bottlenecks" --output-format json. Claude Code's batch processing is built on two pillars: `/batch` and headless mode (`claude -p`). Claude Code v2.1.63 Release Notes — `/batch` and `/simplify` were introduced in this version.
